meta.siteDescription: Citikopi Mandailing Beans exports premium Indonesian coffee, bird's nest, marine delicacies, spices, and heritage foods — sourced with integrity from Sumatra to the world.

home.title: Citikopi Mandailing Beans | Proudly local, perfectly crafted
home.description: Mandailing Arabica coffee beans from highlands above 1,300 m and premium Indonesian specialty exports — ethically sourced in Medan, North Sumatra.

about.title: About us | Citikopi Mandailing Beans
about.description: Our story: from the heart of Indonesia to global markets — sustainability, fairness, and authentic Mandailing craftsmanship.

products.title: Products | Citikopi Mandailing Beans
products.description: Coffee beans, bird's nest, fish maw, sea cucumber, spices, traditional sweets, and palm sugar — curated for export quality.

contact.title: Contact | Citikopi Mandailing Beans
contact.description: Reach Citikopi Mandailing Beans in Medan for product inquiries, partnerships, and export opportunities.

featuredCoffee.title: Mandailing coffee beans
featuredCoffee.description: Our signature export — carefully processed beans that carry North Sumatra’s highlands in every cup. Special Arabica coffee beans from highlands above 1,300 m.

hero.title: From Indonesian highlands to your cup
hero.subtitle: We bring Indonesia’s finest — coffee, spices, and natural delicacies — with ethical sourcing and uncompromising quality.

values.title: Sustainable & ethical sourcing
values.intro: We work closely with farmers, harvesters, and communities so every harvest respects people and place.

items.fair: Fair compensation and respectful working conditions
items.small: Support for small-scale producers and local knowledge

local.title: 100% local & authentic
local.body: Every item is selected, processed, and packaged to preserve authenticity, freshness, and cultural heritage.

aboutTeaser.title: From the heart of Indonesia
aboutTeaser.body: Citikopi Mandailing Beans is dedicated to sharing Indonesia’s natural treasures with global markets — hand in hand with farmers and artisans.

contactTeaser.title: Partner with us
contactTeaser.body: Interested in our products or export programs? Our team in Medan is ready to help.

introVideo.title: Watch our introduction
introVideo.description: Get to know Citikopi Mandailing Beans in motion — origin, craft, and what we bring to your market.

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.body: Citikopi Mandailing Beans is a proudly Indonesian company bringing the richness of our islands to the world. We source, process, and export authentic products — from premium coffee and bird’s nest to traditional sweets, spices, and marine delicacies. Rooted in sustainability, fairness, and cultural respect, we work alongside farmers, fishers, and craftspeople so every shipment tells a story of Indonesia’s abundance and care. Our mission is simple: deliver nature’s finest with integrity and heart.

productsPage.title: Our products
productsPage.intro: A curated range of Indonesian specialties, prepared to meet discerning export and retail standards.

coffee.title: Coffee beans
coffee.description: Single-origin Indonesian coffee from highland farms across Sumatra, Java, and Sulawesi.

nest.title: Bird’s nest (walet)
nest.description: Premium nests harvested sustainably from swallow houses in Sumatra and Kalimantan.

fishMaw.title: Fish maw (hupio)
fishMaw.description: Dried fish maw, rich in collagen — a treasured ingredient in refined cuisines.

seaCucumber.title: Sea cucumber (haisom)
seaCucumber.description: Carefully processed sea cucumber from Indonesian waters, ideal for export markets.

spices.title: Spices & herbs
spices.description: Indonesia’s heritage in every aroma — bold, fragrant, and potent.

sweets.title: Traditional sweets & biscuits
sweets.description: Classic snacks that blend local flavors with enduring tradition.

palmSugar.title: Palm sugar
palmSugar.description: Naturally tapped and slow-cooked from Indonesian palm trees.
